title: Shoengen
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Shoengen''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Brosi]]. It was in the [[Shoengen Delta]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Shoengen was within the sphere of influence of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
